/apps/cuda/cuda-12.4/bin/nvcc -forward-unknown-to-host-compiler -O3 -DNDEBUG "--generate-code=arch=compute_70,code=[compute_70,sm_70]" "--generate-code=arch=compute_80,code=[compute_80,sm_80]" -Xcompiler=-fPIC -Wno-deprecated-gpu-targets -shared -dlink --options-file CMakeFiles/mpi_cuda_tests.dir/deviceObjects1.rsp -o CMakeFiles/mpi_cuda_tests.dir/cmake_device_link.o --options-file CMakeFiles/mpi_cuda_tests.dir/deviceLinkLibs.rsp -L"/apps/cuda/cuda-12.4/lib64"
